title: PowaTek
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''PowaTek''' was a manufacturer of [[Power cell/Legends|power cells]].

{{Company-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[http://www.powatek.com Powatek] is also the name of a real-world electrical contractor based in Australia.
